chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-1420 of 2024 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) PRIORITY. 1. For hearing of Misc. No.6588/24 2. For hearing of main case. 21.10.2025. Ms. Saima Imdad, Assistant Advocate General ------------------------------------ This case was last taken up on 06.05.2024 which is almost over 11⁄2 year ago. Despite lapse of 11⁄2 year learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation which shows that petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition which is hereby dismissed on account of non-prosecution alongwith pending application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
